items.title: ACHR calls for adoption of “Ahwal” and “Wholocide” as designations for Israel’s genocide against Palestinians

items.title: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian imports
items.dek: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.
items.body: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

items.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for death of soldiers
items.dek: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.body: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
